blocks.text: Norway's greatest night — Bodø/Glimt dare to dream at San Siro
A 3-1 first-leg lead means Bodø/Glimt need only avoid a three-goal loss tonight. Norwegian football has never been this close to a Champions League quarter-final.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) opens DraculaN S5 vs MANA in CS2
